title: Intended-pairing map
description: tokens/pairings.json — explicit fg/bg token pairs the system intends to be used together (#87). Checked against base + every brand by validate.mjs and validate_brand.

fg.description: Dotted token path of the foreground (text or edge) color.

bg.description: Dotted token path of the background the fg sits on.

kind.description: text → WCAG AA 4.5:1; non-text → SC 1.4.11 3:1 (interactive edges, focus indicators).

context.description: Where this pairing renders — the human reason the pair exists.

excludeBrands.description: Brands that never render this pair (document why in $excludeBrands-note).
